# Copilot instructions

Use **AGENTS.md** at the repository root for coding standards, project structure, tooling (PHPUnit, PHPStan, PHPCS, Rector), design-pattern recommendations, and workflows; keep config for tests, static analysis, and Rector in the `tests/` directory. For the agent working process — container-only tooling, editing guardrails, and the verification checklist — see **[docs/ai-workflow.md](../docs/ai-workflow.md)**.
